import json
from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass
class UserPreference:
    user_id: int
    theme: str = "light"
    language: str = "en"

    def to_dict(self) -> dict:
        return {"user_id": self.user_id, "theme": self.theme, "lang": self.language}


class PreferenceRepository:
    def __init__(self, remote_client, file_storage):
        self._remote = remote_client
        self._storage = file_storage

    def sync(self, pref: UserPreference) -> bool:
        return self._remote.post("/preferences", pref.to_dict())

    def export_to_file(self, pref: UserPreference, path: str) -> None:
        self._storage.write(path, json.dumps(pref.to_dict()))
